ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing, etc.) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "word_count" TEXT /* Word count of the review text */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment analysis result (1 for positive, 0 for neutral, -1 for negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review that the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review that the reaction is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the reaction */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., like, dislike) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the reaction was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reactions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review that the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being analyzed */,
  "avg_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the product (average sentiment of all reviews) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
